programme.title: ⭐⭐ 3.6m @ 14s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 1.8m @ 16s 💨 Wind: 5.0km/h ENE (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 10.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m
📋 Long period - powerful waves
